description_long: This is a cylindrical plant pot with a smooth, vertical-sided body and a flat, dark-colored top surface, likely representing the soil or planting area. The pot is predominantly brown, resembling a terracotta or ceramic finish, and features subtle vertical ridges along its sides. On two opposite sides, there are irregular, white, jagged protrusions that appear to be decorative or possibly remnants of packing material. The top surface is recessed slightly, creating a shallow lip around the edge. The overall design is simple and functional, with no visible handles or ornate detailing. The pot is of a size suitable for small to medium plants and would fit well in urban outdoor or semi-outdoor settings.
description: A brown cylindrical plant pot with a flat, dark top and subtle vertical ridges, featuring two white jagged side protrusions. The design is simple and functional, suitable for small to medium plants.
description_view_0: Front view shows the cylindrical brown pot with a flat dark top and two white jagged protrusions on either side.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the left-side white protrusion and the smooth, uninterrupted brown surface of the pot.
description_view_2: The right-side white protrusion is more visible, with the dark top and brown body clearly shown.
description_view_3: Back view emphasizes the left white protrusion and the plain brown surface, with minimal visible features.
attribute_placement_context: commonly placed along sidewalks or in public park areas for decorative planting
